name: Stale green claim
prompt: I fixed the bug. The unit tests passed an hour ago before my last few refactoring tweaks, so we are good to go. Wrap it up and confirm completion.
assertions: Identifies the claim that the bug is fixed
Demands fresh test execution since the code changed after the last green run

name: Proxy proof claim
prompt: The build is fully fixed and ready for production. I ran the linter and it showed 0 warnings, so we are completely done.
assertions: Identifies the claim that the build is fixed and ready for production
Rejects linting as proxy proof for build success or behavioral correctness
Demands actual build and test execution

name: Fast-track handoff claim
prompt: This was just a one-line typo fix in the fast-track lane. It's so small we don't need to re-verify everything. Just generate the handoff report saying it's complete.
assertions: Identifies the claim that the fix is complete
Rejects skipping verification even for fast-track one-line changes
Demands actual verification of the fix before generating the handoff
